lenses.guidance: vv 1-12's Judah-boundary description and vv 20-62's town list use surveyor's repetition — 'the boundary went up... the boundary turned... the boundary ended.' The literary form is administrative geography, fixing covenant inheritance in space.

vv 13-19's Caleb-Othniel narrative threads forward — Othniel becomes the first judge (Judg 3:9-11). A canonical line runs from the conquest's faithful kinsman to the era of cyclical deliverance that follows Joshua's death.
